Class TripletMatrix

  • Defined in File triplet_matrix.hpp

Nested Relationships

Nested Types

  • Struct TripletMatrix::Block

Class Documentation

class TripletMatrix

Public Types

using Triplet = Eigen::Triplet<real_t>
using ColSparse = Eigen::SparseMatrix<real_t, Eigen::ColMajor>
using RowSparse = Eigen::SparseMatrix<real_t, Eigen::RowMajor>

Public Functions

TripletMatrix() = default
inline TripletMatrix(int rows, int cols)
inline TripletMatrix(int rows, int cols, std::shared_ptr<std::vector<Triplet>> data)
inline TripletMatrix zeroLike() const
inline TripletMatrix operator|(const TripletMatrix &other) const
inline TripletMatrix vConcat(const TripletMatrix &other) const
inline TripletMatrix operator*(real_t s) const
inline TripletMatrix T() const
inline TripletMatrix scaleRows(const VectorXr &rowScales) const
inline const ColSparse &asSparse() const
inline const RowSparse &asSparseRowMajor() const
inline int nRows() const
inline int nCols() const

Public Static Functions

static inline TripletMatrix zero(int rows, int cols)
static inline TripletMatrix zeroLike(const TripletMatrix &other)
static inline TripletMatrix fromDiag(const VectorXr &diag)
